context: Tests whether the agent gives source-accurate SwiftUI gesture precedence and GestureMask guidance without over-expanding into sibling skills.

checklist.name: Default precedence
checklist.description: States that .gesture attaches with lower precedence than gestures already defined by the view or its children, rather than saying it always swallows child gestures.

checklist.name: Simultaneous handling
checklist.description: Explains .simultaneousGesture as the choice when parent and child handlers should both process the same interaction.

checklist.name: High priority handling
checklist.description: Explains .highPriorityGesture as the choice when the added parent gesture should take precedence over existing gestures.

checklist.name: GestureMask accuracy
checklist.description: Describes GestureMask .gesture, .subviews, .all, and .none in terms of enabling the added gesture and/or subview hierarchy gestures.

checklist.name: Sibling boundaries
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on gesture conflict resolution and does not turn the task into broader navigation, layout, or architecture guidance.
